documents.description: DECREE CHANGING NAME FILED BY PETITIONER MALDONADO, JEANINE ELIZABETH

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Mar-22-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: J. WILLIS-MCGHEE S. Ravinantapricha,
CSR: B. Fields #7235

Petitioner Jeaninne Elizabeth Maldonado was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication is in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to Jae Yani Maldonado.
Court further orders the gender is changed from female to male.
Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
